name: Jinzo - Lord
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>人</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>造</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぞう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>人</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>にん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>間</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>げん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－サイコ・ロード
desc: Cannot be Normal Summoned/Set. Must be Special Summoned (from your hand) by sending 1 face-up "Jinzo" you control to the GY. Trap Cards, and their effects on the field, cannot be activated. Negate all Trap effects on the field. Once per turn: You can destroy as many face-up Traps on the field as possible, and if you do, inflict 300 damage to your opponent for each card destroyed.
mnst_eff: Cannot be Normal Summoned/Set. Must be Special Summoned (from your hand) by sending 1 face-up "Jinzo" you control to the GY. Trap Cards, and their effects on the field, cannot be activated. Negate all Trap effects on the field. Once per turn: You can destroy as many face-up Traps on the field as possible, and if you do, inflict 300 damage to your opponent for each card destroyed.
eff: Cannot be Normal Summoned/Set. Must be Special Summoned (from your hand) by sending 1 face-up "Jinzo" you control to the GY. Trap Cards, and their effects on the field, cannot be activated. Negate all Trap effects on the field. Once per turn: You can destroy as many face-up Traps on the field as possible, and if you do, inflict 300 damage to your opponent for each card destroyed.

sets.set: Speed Duel: Streets of Battle City

eff_types: Summoning condition, Summoning condition, Continuous, Continuous, Ignition
action: Sends from field to Graveyard for Special Summon
mst: Negates the effects of Trap Cards
